sourceMovie.title: The Smurfs 2
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto The Smurfs 2 (2013) as a fantasy theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The fantasy and family blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Super Mario Bros. Movie
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Smurfs 2 clicked for you, The Super Mario Bros. Movie (2023) is a strong next stop: both trade in fantasy and family, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Smurfs 2?
faq.answer: Try The Super Mario Bros. Movie, Puss in Boots: The Last Wish, The Boxtrolls—each shares DNA with The Smurfs 2 while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Smurfs 2?
faq.answer: The Smurfs 2 (2013) is best described as Fantasy, Family, Comedy, Animation. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Smurfs 2 part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "The Smurfs (Theatrical) Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
